main.description: A request for a dispatcher to spawn a new client onto the bus. It carries DATA only, never a command to run: the dispatcher launches its OWN trusted harness, so a request can never inject code onto the dispatcher's host. The requester is the bus-stamped frame author, which the dispatcher trusts as the spawn lineage's true parent.

prompt.description: The task handed to the spawned client (the dispatcher exports it to the harness as $SX_PROMPT).

nickname.description: Requested display name for the spawned client (minted kind=agent). The dispatcher may adjust it to keep it unique; the bus is the sole minter (ADR-0020).

job.description: Lineage tag propagated across a spawn tree, so all spawns descended from one root share a job id.

parent.description: Optional requester id, informational only. The dispatcher trusts the bus-stamped frame author as the real parent, never this field.
